title: SPICE convergence failed after PDK corner switch
symptoms: convergence not reached, missing model parameter, vth0, corner include
root_cause: The simulator loaded a typical corner model while the netlist referenced a device parameter only defined in the low-power corner.
fix: Verify the model include order and rerun with the intended PDK corner file before tuning timestep settings.

title: Undefined subckt caused by missing standard-cell library include
symptoms: undefined subckt, cannot find cell, INV_X1, NAND2_X1
root_cause: The generated netlist referenced cells from a library file that was not included in the simulator runset.
fix: Add the standard-cell library netlist include before the top-level design netlist and rerun netlist elaboration.

title: LVS mismatch from stale extracted layout database
symptoms: lvs mismatch, short, open, extracted layout, calibre
root_cause: The LVS job compared the latest schematic netlist against an older extracted layout database.
fix: Regenerate extraction with the current rule deck and confirm the schematic/layout revision pair before rerunning LVS.

title: EDA job failed because license feature was unavailable
symptoms: license checkout failed, feature not found, lmgrd, server
root_cause: The requested simulator feature was not available on the configured license server.
fix: Confirm license server reachability and feature name, then ask CAD/IT to inspect checkout usage and entitlement.
